p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 ∪ x1 or x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 }[Real](s, t, x)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { not is_open_set(x0) or is_closed_set(x0.c) }((s ∪ t).c)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0], x2: T0) { not x0 ⊂ x1 or not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 }[Real](closure(s ∪ t), closure(closure(s) ∪ closure(t)), x)
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not is_closed_set(x0) or not lib(real.topology).is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) or x1 ∈ x0 }(closure(s) ∪ closure(t), x)
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closure(x0) or lib(real.topology).is_adherent_point_of_set(x0, x1) }(closure(s) ∪ closure(t), x)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[Real](closure(s ∪ t), closure(s) ∪ closure(t))
not closure(s ∪ t) ⊂ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closure(s ∪ t) or x0 ∈ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0 ∈ closure(s ∪ t) and not x0 ∈ closure(s) ∪ closure(t)) or not closure(s ∪ t) ⊂ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not closure(s ∪ t) ⊂ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) or not x0 ∈ closure(s ∪ t) or x0 ∈ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closure(s ∪ t) or x0 ∈ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) } or closure(s ∪ t) ⊂ closure(s) ∪ closure(t)

function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closure(s ∪ t) or x0 ∈ closure(s) ∪ closure(t) }(w0)
